highlights.text: On Wednesday at 4pm, I wrote: “ Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6592.” We broke it down Thursday, and a two day grind lower commenced into 6360 by Sunday 7pm.
My targets were (as stated yesterday): “My general lean is ES can push to 6412-15.
The catch though, is they only occur when my core setup - the Failed Breakdown - triggers.
ES plunged to 6353 last evening going elevator down .
An alternative is to wait for it to flush and recover (perhaps to 6353) for a Failed Breakdown.” We got this trigger at 830pm last evening, and were off.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow

post_title: SPX Snaps Its 5 Day Losing Streak. Is The Low In? April 1st Plan
